title: 3Blue1Brown: Neural Networks
note: Visual intuition for weights, biases, and backpropagation.

title: Karpathy: Neural Networks Zero to Hero
note: Build neural nets and a GPT from scratch, backprop step by step.

title: The Illustrated Transformer
note: The visual gold standard for self-attention and transformer mechanics.

title: Attention Is All You Need
note: The seminal paper introducing the Transformer.

title: fast.ai: Practical Deep Learning for Coders
note: Top-down, hands-on training and fine-tuning of real models.

title: LLM Visualization (bbycroft)
note: Interactive 3D walkthrough of a Transformer generating text.

title: An Introduction to Statistical Learning
note: The definitive free textbook on classical ML, with Python labs.

title: Anthropic: Building Effective Agents
note: Canonical patterns for robust agentic workflows.

title: Hugging Face: AI Agents Course
note: Hands-on lessons on tools, reasoning, and building real agents.

title: LangGraph (intro + tutorials)
note: Building cyclic, stateful, multi-agent workflows.

title: Multi AI Agent Systems with crewAI
note: Short course on multi-agent collaboration and role-based tasks.

title: LlamaIndex: Agents
note: Retrieval-aware and data-connected agents (RAG).

title: Microsoft AutoGen
note: A framework for multi-agent conversation and cooperation.

title: Cognitive Architectures for Language Agents
note: A systematic design framework (CoALA) for language agents.

title: DeepLearning.AI: ChatGPT Prompt Engineering for Developers
note: The classic foundational course on prompting and building with LLMs.

title: Karpathy: Vibe Coding MenuGen
note: The case study that named vibe coding, building an app with near-zero handwritten code.

title: Cursor Documentation
note: The AI-first IDE that popularized interactive vibe coding.

title: OpenAI Prompt Engineering Guide
note: Concise, actionable tactics for better model outputs.

title: Anthropic Prompt Engineering Overview
note: Claude-specific prompting, XML tags, and system prompts.

title: Aider Documentation
note: Command-line AI pair programmer that edits files in Git.

title: DAIR.AI Prompting Guide
note: An extensive community compendium of prompting techniques.

title: Your AI Product Needs Evals (Hamel Husain)
note: A practical guide to building custom, domain-specific evals.

title: Promptfoo
note: Open-source CLI for prompt evals, assertions, and red-teaming.

title: DeepLearning.AI: Evaluating and Debugging Generative AI
note: Tracking, versioning, and systematically evaluating gen models.

title: Ragas
note: Evaluating RAG applications with LLM-as-a-judge.

title: OpenAI Evals
note: Open-source framework for building and running eval benchmarks.

title: Stanford HELM
note: A multi-metric benchmark across accuracy, safety, and bias.

title: Anthropic: Define Success Criteria and Build Evaluations
note: Designing measurable success criteria and running evals.

title: Hugging Face Alignment Handbook
note: Recipes and code for SFT, DPO, and preference optimization.

title: The Llama 3 Herd of Models
note: A detailed technical report on post-training and architecture.

title: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO)
note: Aligning LLMs to preferences without RL training.

title: Training Compute-Optimal LLMs (Chinchilla)
note: The scaling laws balancing parameters and training tokens.

title: Constitutional AI
note: Aligning model behavior with an AI constitution.

title: Emergent Abilities of Large Language Models
note: How complex skills appear at scale boundaries.

title: OpenAI: Learning to Reason with LLMs
note: How RL-trained chain-of-thought powers reasoning models.
